**Evanns Morales-Cuadrado** | Robotics PhD Student | Georgia Institute of Technology · U.S. Citizen

| | |
|---|---|
| **Email** | evannsmc [at] gmail [dot] com |
| **Research Website** | [https://www.evannsmc.com/](https://www.evannsmc.com/) |
| **Github** | [https://github.com/evannsmc](https://github.com/evannsmc) |
| **LinkedIn** | [https://www.linkedin.com/in/evanns-morales/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/evanns-morales/) |
